GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [revenue@1 DESC, o_orderdate@2 ASC NULLS LAST]
  GpuSortExec: expr=[revenue@1 DESC, o_orderdate@2 ASC NULLS LAST], fetch=10
    GpuProjectExec: expr=[l_orderkey@0 as l_orderkey, sum(lineitem.l_extendedprice * Int64(1) - lineitem.l_discount)@3 as revenue, o_orderdate@1 as o_orderdate, o_shippriority@2 as o_shippriority]
      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[l_orderkey, o_orderdate, o_shippriority], aggr=[sum(lineitem.l_extendedprice * Int64(1) - lineitem.l_discount)]
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=20648881
          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([l_orderkey@0, o_orderdate@1, o_shippriority@2], 8), input_partitions=8
            GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[l_orderkey, o_orderdate, o_shippriority], aggr=[sum(lineitem.l_extendedprice * Int64(1) - lineitem.l_discount)]
              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=20648881
                GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(o_orderkey@0, l_orderkey@0)], projection=[1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=20648881
                    GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([o_orderkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=20648881
                        GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(c_custkey@0, o_custkey@1)], projection=[1, 3, 4]
                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=20648881
                            GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([c_custkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=20648881
                                GpuFilterExec: predicate=c_mktsegment@1 = BUILDING, projection=[0]
                                  GpuScanExec: batch_size=20648881
                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=20648881
                            GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([o_custkey@1], 8), input_partitions=8
                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=20648881
                                GpuFilterExec: predicate=o_orderdate@2 < 1995-03-15
                                  GpuScanExec: batch_size=20648881
                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=20648881
                    GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([l_orderkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=20648881
                        GpuFilterExec: predicate=l_shipdate@3 > 1995-03-15, projection=[0, 1, 2]
                          GpuScanExec: batch_size=20648881
--- memory ---
total_estimate_cost=1528
GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: row_width=32, subtree_max_row_bytes=104, estimate_input_bytes=32, estimate_output_bytes=32, estimate_cost=64
  GpuSortExec: row_width=32, subtree_max_row_bytes=104, estimate_input_bytes=32, estimate_output_bytes=32, estimate_cost=64
    GpuProjectExec: row_width=32, subtree_max_row_bytes=104, estimate_input_bytes=32, estimate_output_bytes=32, estimate_cost=64
      GpuAggregateExec: row_width=32, subtree_max_row_bytes=104, estimate_input_bytes=32, estimate_output_bytes=32, estimate_cost=64
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=32, subtree_max_row_bytes=104, estimate_input_bytes=32, estimate_output_bytes=32, estimate_cost=64

                        GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=48, estimate_input_bytes=32, estimate_output_bytes=16, estimate_cost=48
